title: Sample session — moments list

messages.content: List the latest 3 moments with authors
Bound Moment list UI with User join. Change sort/page without LLM (usedLlm: false).
(UI) Open Charts tab, set groupBy=User.name, series=Moment.id Count
Chart renders via ECharts; optional APIJSON @group aggregate when available.

notes: Illustrative transcript for docs and regression review. Not a live recording.
